visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black long-sleeved top and a brown pleated skirt, stands on a sunny street corner in Tainan, Taiwan. Behind her is a traditional bakery stall with a large yellow sign and a green awning. (2) Close-up shots highlight brown paper bags with red branding for '阿堯師老正牌雞蛋糕'. The camera pans across multiple bags filled with snacks. (3) The scene shifts to the cooking area where circular egg cakes are being prepared in metal molds. A hand uses a metal pick to flip and remove the golden-brown cakes. (4) The woman is joined by a friend wearing a white lace dress and a blue fuzzy hat. They stand together on the street, holding the bag of cakes and talking to the camera. (5) Detailed close-ups show the women breaking the cakes open with their hands to reveal cream and red bean fillings. They take bites and react with expressions of enjoyment and surprise. (6) The video concludes with the primary woman sitting in the back seat of a car, holding the snack bag and giving a final summary of her experience.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 妹妹要帶我們吃什麼?. (2) [Slogan]: 阿堯師雞蛋糕. (3) [Subtitle]: 在地人吃的雞蛋糕 我們來試試看 而且現在沒有排隊 聽說平常要排隊. (4) [Variety]: 蜂蜜的香氣. (5) [Subtitle]: 現場就有蜂蜜的香氣 我們先來吃看看 我點了一個綜合原味 紅豆跟奶油. (6) [Subtitle]: 那價格都非常划算 好大一個 酥酥脆脆的 氣飽 然後會爆餡的那一種 很濃郁 我覺得他奶油好好吃 紅豆 裡面還看得到紅豆顆粒耶 紅豆超好吃 你完全吃得到 顆粒的紅豆 紅豆餡 你吃起來就是那種現煮 然後煮的密密的 然後不會 沒有加太多糖 所以你吃到他本身的豆香 還有點點顆粒感. (7) [Variety]: 滿滿的紅豆餡. (8) [Variety]: 大黑馬. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後是原味 沒有包任何東西 純雞蛋糕的味道 越嚼越香 讓人忍不住一口接一口 熱熱吃真的很棒 外酥裡面內軟 如果有不包餡的東西 我會覺得很無聊 可他這個原味越嚼越香 我們的心得是 他最厲害的是原味.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female hosts, 1 bakery worker, and approximately 5 passers-by in the background street scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a black top with a choker. The other woman wears a white dress and a distinctive blue fuzzy hat with tassels.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bustling street corner in Tainan featuring a street-side bakery stall, parked scooters, and a modern car interior.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice greets the audience over an upbeat, medium-tempo electronic pop BGM. The tone is enthusiastic and welcoming. (2) A distinct rustling sound of paper is heard as the presenter handles the snack bags. Background street noise is faint but present. (3) A second female voice enters with high pitch variability, expressing excitement about the smell of the cakes. Short intakes of breath suggest anticipation. (4) A sharp 'ding' sound effect marks the appearance of text on screen, while the vocal delivery becomes rapid during the food description. (5) Audible chewing and soft vocal reactions like 'Mmm' occur while the hosts taste the fillings. The speech remains clear with professional enunciation. (6) The acoustic environment shifts to a more enclosed car cabin with lower ambient noise floor as the primary speaker delivers the final summary.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share and recommend a local Tainan snack shop by showcasing its authentic production, the variety of flavors, and the positive physical reactions of the creators.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A standard organic street food review vlog style without formal commercial disclosure.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy food recommendation video that effectively utilizes close-up food shots and host charisma to engage the viewer.
